description: User scrolls vertically through the 'Explore' page to browse available research opportunities.
frame_description: The Explore page is visible, showing a list of research tasks and sessions with various pay rates.

description: User clicks the filter icon in the top right corner of the screen.
frame_description: The user is activating the filter menu to refine the list of opportunities.

description: The 'Filter Opportunities' modal slides up from the bottom of the screen.
frame_description: A modal overlay appears on top of the Explore page, containing various filter categories.

description: User pauses to review the filter options (Task Type, Duration, Pay Rate, Device) without making any selections.
frame_description: The filter modal is fully displayed, showing options like 'Survey', 'AI Interview', and 'Video Call'.

description: User clicks the 'X' close button in the top right of the filter modal.
frame_description: The user is dismissing the filter menu without applying any new filters.

description: The filter modal slides down and disappears from view.
frame_description: The modal is closing, returning the user to the main opportunity list.

description: User continues to scroll through the list of opportunities on the Explore page.
frame_description: The user is back on the main list, browsing through cards for 'Video Call', 'In Person', and 'Diary Study' sessions.
